session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here's a summary of the issues found:
## Summary
**Status: FAILED**
### Issues Found:
1. **Prettier Formatting Issues (15 files)** - Code style issues found in 15 files that need formatting with `--write` flag - Files include: - `.claude/commands/erk/objective-create.md` - `.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md` - `.claude/commands/erk/replan.md` - `.claude/commands/erk/system/objective-plan-node.md` - `.claude/skills/objective/SKILL.md` - `docs/learned/architecture/github-graphql-label-semantics.md` - `docs/learned/cli/backend-aware-display.md` - `docs/learned/cli/local-commands.md` - `docs/learned/integrations/codex/codex-skills-system.md` - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/integrations/linear-erk-mapping.md` - `docs/learned/planning/incremental-dispatch.md` - `docs/learned/planning/learn-vs-implementation-plans.md` - `docs/learned/tui/data-contract.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
2. **Ruff Lint Error (1 error)** - Location: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/objective_issues/test_label_definitions.py` - Rule: **F811** - Redefinition of unused `test_get_erk_label_definitions_contains_erk_pr` - Line 61: Duplicate function definition (original at line 19) - The function is defined twice with identical names, which causes a conflict
### Passing Checks:
- AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md pairing: PASSED (19 files checked, 0 violations) - Format check: 1739 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5921 passed - Unit tests (erk-dev): 138 passed - Unit tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed - Unit tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
The main blockers are the duplicate test function definition in `tests/unit/objective_issues/test_label_definitions.py` and the Prettier formatting issues in 15 files.
